rationale: Section 25.011 governs records for property specially appraised under Chapter 23 (e.g., agricultural/timber land). The proposed homestead exemption increase under §11.13(b) does not implicate special appraisal recordkeeping requirements.
quote: The chief appraiser for each appraisal district shall prepare and maintain a record of property specially appraised under Chapter 23 of this code and subject, in the future, to additional taxation for change in use or status.
_note: No conflict identified; §25.011 addresses Chapter 23 special appraisal records, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under §11.13(b).
